mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.merchant_id, s.category_id, c.name AS category_name, s.name, s.price, s.image, s.description, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM setmeal s LEFT JOIN category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{setmealId} AND s.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM setmeal_dish sd LEFT JOIN dish d ON sd.dish_id = d.id WHERE sd.setmeal_id = #{setmealId} AND d.status = 0
